Factory and purchase systems now owns the branch-checked route for destroyed-factory purchase refund behavior; current source/Vanilla, stable, upstream and perf still have no dead/null factory refund, while release 7195b331 only adds adjacent _currentCost plumbing and an empty/crewless-branch refund. No gameplay source changed.

Gear template profile filter now owns the branch-checked route for AddTemplate creation, FillTemplates display and SaveTemplateProfile save-gate alignment; current source/Vanilla, stable, upstream, perf and release all keep the Barracks-or-Gear creation gate, Gear-only display gate and undefined save-filter _u_upgrade. No gameplay source changed.

updateProtocol: Before substantial work, update agent-collaboration.json and append a claim event to agent-events.jsonl.
For long work, append heartbeat events with current source scope.
For source-backed issues, append finding events and add Agent-Worklog.md notes.
When done, append complete or handoff events and update dashboard/status files if visible progress changed.
Keep historic batch detail in Agent-Worklog.md, Subagent-Discovery-Swarm.md and agent-events.jsonl instead of expanding this compact status file.
